## What this adds

## Type of change

- [ ] New guide
- [ ] New tool
- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] Site / infra change
- [ ] Fix / edit to existing content

## Checklist (for content PRs)

- [ ] Frontmatter is valid (build passes)
- [ ] `draft: false`
- [ ] Ran `pnpm dev` and reviewed the rendered page
- [ ] Editorial bar: specific, honest, short
